tasks.label: Build and Sync Frontend
tasks.command: npm run build:local && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('../backend/dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('dist', '../backend/dist', { recursive: true }); console.log('Successfully synced dist to backend!');"

tasks.label: Build and Sync Frontend (Production)
tasks.command: npm run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('../backend/dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('dist', '../backend/dist', { recursive: true }); console.log('Successfully synced production dist to backend!');"
